[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011001 3
1 1010000 2
2 1010000 2
3 1010000 2
4 0001110 3
5 0100000 1
6 0000000 a
7 0111101 5

01 0000111 3
12 0100011 3
23 0110110 4
34 1111111 a
45 1111111 a
56 0100001 2
67 1010001 3
70 1100010 3

02 1011011 5
13 1101010 4
24 0110110 4
35 1111111 a
46 0100001 2
57 0001111 4
60 1001100 3
71 0011010 3

03 0010010 2
14 1101010 4
25 0110110 4
36 0100001 2
47 0001111 4
50 0010010 2

37 0001111 4
40 0010010 2
51 1101010 4
62 1101000 3
73 0001111 4

05 0010010 2
